name_en: Museum of Fine Arts of Reims

phrases.context: Entry is free for permanent collections. The museum is housed in a former abbey and has an excellent collection of 13th–20th century works.

phrases.french: Où sont les portraits de Cranach ?
phrases.phonetic: oo son lay por-TRAY duh KRAH-nak
phrases.context: The museum holds a remarkable series of 27 portraits by Lucas Cranach the Elder and Younger — one of the finest Cranach collections in the world.

tips: Free permanent collection — a genuine hidden gem often skipped by visitors focused only on champagne and cathedral
27 Cranach portraits — one of the finest collections outside Germany
